title: Add Lunere Image Gen to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Lunere Image Gen](https://lunere-image-gen.vercel.app/) to image
- Generate images with Lunere Image Gen using pollinations.ai.

Fixes #10050

gist.headline: Lunere joins the garden
gist.blurb: Another day, another app. Lunere Image Gen just dropped into the community greenhouse, ready to turn your prompts into pixels.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Lunere Image Gen app to the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md directories.
gist.impact: Users exploring the pollinations ecosystem can now discover and launch Lunere Image Gen directly from the showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new moon-themed painting easel or canvas into a lush greenhouse. 'Lunere' evokes lunar/moon imagery. The scene should feel like a new plant or tool being added to a cozy garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot setting up a glowing moon-themed painting easel in a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot setting up a glowing moon-themed painting easel in a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
